learningObjectives: Name and use twelve weather and season words at Movers A1 level.
Use It's + adjective to describe today's weather (It's sunny today).
Use was and were to talk about weather and places in the past.
Read a short text about weather today vs yesterday and complete sentences.
Listen for weather and season words in short dialogues.
Write a short message about the weather (at least 15 words).
Talk about weather and favourite seasons in short spoken answers.

vocabularyBank.exampleTranslation: Hôm nay ở Hà Nội trời nắng.

vocabularyBank.exampleSentence: Yesterday it was rainy and windy.
vocabularyBank.exampleTranslation: Hôm qua trời mưa và có gió.

vocabularyBank.exampleSentence: It is windy so we stay inside.
vocabularyBank.exampleTranslation: Trời có gió nên chúng tôi ở trong nhà.

vocabularyBank.exampleSentence: Autumn days are often cloudy in Hanoi.
vocabularyBank.exampleTranslation: Ngày thu ở Hà Nội thường nhiều mây.

vocabularyBank.exampleSentence: It doesn't snow in Hanoi in winter.
vocabularyBank.exampleTranslation: Mùa đông ở Hà Nội không có tuyết.

vocabularyBank.exampleSentence: Minh likes spring when the flowers bloom.
vocabularyBank.exampleTranslation: Minh thích mùa xuân khi hoa nở.

vocabularyBank.exampleSentence: Summer is hot and sometimes rainy.
vocabularyBank.exampleTranslation: Mùa hè nóng và đôi khi có mưa.

vocabularyBank.exampleSentence: Autumn is cloudy and cool in Vietnam.
vocabularyBank.exampleTranslation: Mùa thu ở Việt Nam nhiều mây và mát.

vocabularyBank.exampleSentence: Winter can be cold in the north of Vietnam.
vocabularyBank.exampleTranslation: Mùa đông ở miền Bắc Việt Nam có thể lạnh.
Hôm nay trời nóng và nắng.

vocabularyBank.exampleSentence: Minh and Linh talk about the weather every day.
vocabularyBank.exampleTranslation: Minh và Linh nói về thời tiết mỗi ngày.

grammarReference.structure: Present simple weather: It's sunny today
grammarReference.explanation: Use It's (It is) + adjective to describe the weather today. It's sunny. It's rainy. It's hot. It's cold. For questions: Is it sunny today?
commonMistakes: It sunny today (×) → It's sunny today (✓)
It's a sunny today (×) → It's sunny today (✓) — no a before adjective
Is sunny today? (×) → Is it sunny today? (✓)

grammarReference.explanation: Use was for I/he/she/it and were for you/we/they to talk about the past. Yesterday it was rainy. We were at home. Was it cold yesterday? They were happy.
examples: Minh and Linh were at home.
commonMistakes: Yesterday it were rainy (×) → it was rainy (✓) — it → was
We was at home (×) → We were at home (✓)
Was it cold yesterday? Yes, it were. (×) → Yes, it was. (✓)

grammarReference.explanation: Combine season nouns with weather adjectives. In summer the weather is hot. In winter it can be cold. Use present simple for general facts and past simple for specific days.
examples: In spring the weather is warm.
It doesn't snow in Hanoi in winter.
commonMistakes: In summer it is hotly (×) → it is hot (✓)
Winter is coldly (×) → Winter is cold (✓)
Last summer were hot (×) → Last summer was hot (✓)

lessons.title: Lesson 1: Weather Words
lessons.learningObjective: Recognise and use sunny, rainy, windy and cloudy in short weather sentences.

exercises.title: Learn: Weather Adjectives
exercises.instructions: Read each clue. Choose the best word.

questions.questionText: When the sun is shining, it is _____.
questions.explanation: Sunny (nắng) — có ánh nắng mặt trời.

choices.distractorNote: Nhiều mây nhưng không nhất thiết nắng

questions.questionText: When water falls from the sky, it is _____.
questions.explanation: Rainy (có mưa) — trời mưa.

questions.questionText: When the air moves a lot, it is _____.
questions.explanation: Windy (có gió) — gió thổi mạnh.

questions.questionText: When there are many grey clouds, it is _____.
questions.explanation: Cloudy (nhiều mây) — bầu trời đầy mây.

exercises.title: Practice: Match Weather Words
exercises.instructions: Match each word to what it means.

questions.questionText: Match the weather words.
questions.explanation: Mỗi từ mô tả một kiểu thời tiết khác nhau.

pairs.right: rain is falling from the sky
there are many clouds in the sky

exercises.title: Check: Weather Words Quiz
exercises.instructions: No hints — choose the best answer.

questions.questionText: It's _____ today. Minh can play outside.
questions.explanation: Sunny — trời nắng, chơi ngoài trời được.

questions.questionText: Yesterday it was _____ and _____. We stayed inside.
questions.explanation: Rainy and windy — mưa và gió, ở trong nhà.

choices.distractorNote: Tuyết không phù hợp Hà Nội

questions.questionText: Autumn days are often _____ in Hanoi.
questions.explanation: Cloudy — mùa thu thường nhiều mây.

exercises.title: Apply: Complete Weather Sentences
exercises.instructions: Fill in each gap with the correct weather word.

questions.questionText: Complete: Today it's [0]. | Yesterday it was [1]. | It was [2] too, so we stayed home.
questions.explanation: sunny; rainy; windy — hôm nay nắng, hôm qua mưa và gió.

content.template: Today it's [0]. Yesterday it was [1]. It was [2] too, so we stayed home.

exercises.title: Review: Weather Words Mix
exercises.instructions: Mixed review from this lesson. Choose carefully.

questions.questionText: Minh says: It's _____ today. I can play with Linh.
questions.explanation: Sunny — trong bài đọc hôm nay trời nắng.

choices.distractorNote: Nóng hơn là lạnh hôm nay

questions.questionText: Which word means 'rain is falling'?
questions.explanation: Rainy — có mưa.

questions.questionText: We couldn't play in the park. It was _____ and windy.
questions.explanation: Rainy — mưa và gió, không chơi ngoài được.

choices.distractorNote: Nóng không phải lý do chính

lessons.title: Lesson 2: Seasons
lessons.learningObjective: Use spring, summer, autumn and winter to talk about the four seasons.

exercises.title: Learn: Four Seasons
exercises.instructions: Read each sentence. Choose the best season.

questions.questionText: Flowers bloom. The weather is warm. This is _____.
questions.explanation: Spring (mùa xuân) — hoa nở, thời tiết ấm.

questions.questionText: It is hot and sunny. Children like swimming. This is _____.
questions.explanation: Summer (mùa hè) — nóng, đi bơi.

choices.distractorNote: Mùa xuân ấm nhưng không nóng nhất

questions.questionText: The weather is cloudy and cool. Leaves fall. This is _____.
questions.explanation: Autumn (mùa thu) — nhiều mây, mát mẻ.

questions.questionText: It can be cold. In Hanoi it doesn't snow. This is _____.
questions.explanation: Winter (mùa đông) — lạnh, không tuyết ở Hà Nội.

exercises.title: Practice: Match Seasons
exercises.instructions: Match each season to its description.

questions.questionText: Match the four seasons.
questions.explanation: Spring, summer, autumn, winter — bốn mùa trong năm.

exercises.title: Check: Seasons Quiz
exercises.instructions: Choose the best answer. Think carefully.

questions.questionText: Linh loves _____ best because she likes swimming.
questions.explanation: Summer — Linh thích mùa hè vì bơi.

questions.questionText: Minh likes _____ when the flowers bloom.
questions.explanation: Spring — Minh thích mùa xuân.

questions.questionText: Which season is cloudy and cool in Vietnam?
questions.explanation: Autumn — mùa thu nhiều mây và mát.

exercises.title: Apply: Complete Season Sentences
exercises.instructions: Complete the sentences about seasons.

questions.questionText: Complete: In [0] the weather is warm. | [1] is hot. | [2] is cloudy and cool. | [3] can be cold.
questions.explanation: spring; Summer; Autumn; Winter — bốn mùa theo mẹ kể.

content.template: In [0] the weather is warm. [1] is hot. [2] is cloudy and cool. [3] can be cold.

exercises.title: Review: Seasons Mix
exercises.instructions: Mixed review. No hints.

questions.questionText: There are _____ seasons in a year.
questions.explanation: Four — spring, summer, autumn, winter.

questions.questionText: Which season comes after summer?
questions.explanation: Autumn — sau hè là thu.

questions.questionText: Summer is _____ and sometimes rainy.
questions.explanation: Hot — mùa hè nóng.

lessons.title: Lesson 3: Snow, Hot, Cold and Weather
lessons.learningObjective: Use snow, hot, cold and weather in mixed weather and season contexts.

exercises.title: Learn: Hot, Cold, Snow and Weather
exercises.instructions: Choose the word that best completes each sentence.

questions.questionText: It's _____ today. Minh wears a T-shirt.
questions.explanation: Hot (nóng) — mặc áo phông khi trời nóng.

questions.questionText: It was _____ yesterday morning.
questions.explanation: Cold (lạnh) — sáng hôm qua lạnh.

questions.questionText: It doesn't _____ in Hanoi in winter.
questions.explanation: Snow (tuyết) — Hà Nội không có tuyết.

questions.questionText: Minh and Linh talk about the _____ every day.
questions.explanation: Weather (thời tiết) — nói về thời tiết hàng ngày.

exercises.title: Practice: Match Mixed Words
exercises.instructions: Match each word to its meaning.

questions.questionText: Match the weather vocabulary.
questions.explanation: Hot, cold, snow, weather — từ bổ sung cho unit.

pairs.right: white ice that falls in very cold places
sun, rain, wind, hot or cold outside

exercises.title: Check: Mixed Weather Challenge
exercises.instructions: No hints — choose the best answer.

questions.questionText: Today it's sunny and _____.
questions.explanation: Hot — nắng và nóng trong bài đọc.

questions.questionText: Which sentence is correct?
questions.explanation: It doesn't snow in Hanoi — phủ định với snow.

choices.text: It doesn't snow in Hanoi in winter.

questions.questionText: What's the _____ like today?
questions.explanation: Weather — câu hỏi về thời tiết.

exercises.title: Apply: Complete Mixed Sentences
exercises.instructions: Fill in with hot, cold, snow or weather.

questions.questionText: Complete: It's [0] and sunny. | Winter can be [1]. | It doesn't [2] in Hanoi. | We talk about the [3] every day.
questions.explanation: hot; cold; snow; weather — tổng hợp từ bài.

content.template: It's [0] and sunny. Winter can be [1]. It doesn't [2] in Hanoi. We talk about the [3] every day.

exercises.title: Review: All Weather Words Mix
exercises.instructions: Choose the best word from the whole unit.

questions.questionText: Yesterday it was rainy, windy and _____.
questions.explanation: Cold — sáng lạnh kết hợp mưa gió.

questions.questionText: The _____ is sunny today but was rainy yesterday.
questions.explanation: Weather — so sánh thời tiết hôm nay và hôm qua.

questions.questionText: In summer the weather is _____ and sometimes rainy.
questions.explanation: Hot — mùa hè nóng.

lessons.title: Lesson 1: It's + Weather
lessons.learningObjective: Use It's + adjective to describe today's weather (It's sunny today).

exercises.title: Learn: It's Sunny / Rainy
exercises.instructions: Choose the correct sentence.

questions.questionText: Which sentence is correct?
questions.explanation: It's sunny today — It is + tính từ.

choices.distractorNote: Không dùng a trước tính từ

questions.questionText: _____ it hot in summer?
questions.explanation: Is it hot — câu hỏi với It.

questions.questionText: Look outside! _____ rainy now.
questions.explanation: It's — It is rainy.

questions.questionText: Minh says: _____ sunny. I can play outside.
questions.explanation: It's sunny — câu trong bài đọc.

exercises.title: Practice: Complete It's Sentences
exercises.instructions: Fill in It's or Is it.

questions.questionText: Complete: [0] sunny today. | [1] it windy? | No, [2] not windy. | [3] hot in summer.
questions.explanation: It's; Is; it's; It's — khẳng định và câu hỏi.

content.template: [0] sunny today. [1] it windy? No, [2] not windy. [3] hot in summer.

exercises.title: Check: It's Weather Challenge
exercises.instructions: Choose the correct answer.

questions.questionText: Which sentence is NOT correct?
questions.explanation: It is a cloudy — không dùng a trước cloudy.

questions.questionText: Mum says: _____ very hot. Wear a hat.
questions.explanation: It's very hot — lời mẹ trong bài nghe.

questions.questionText: Best answer: Is it sunny today?
questions.explanation: Yes, it is — trả lời câu hỏi Is it…?

choices.text: Yes, it is. It's sunny and hot.

exercises.title: Apply: Build Weather Sentences
exercises.instructions: Put the words in the correct order.

questions.questionText: Make: It's / sunny / and / hot / today.
questions.explanation: It's sunny and hot today.

questions.questionText: Make: Is / it / rainy / now?
questions.explanation: Is it rainy now?

exercises.title: Review: It's Weather Mix
exercises.instructions: Choose the correct sentence.

questions.questionText: Which sentence is correct?
questions.explanation: It's windy so we stay inside — It's + windy.

choices.text: It windy so we stay inside.
It's windy so we stay inside.
It's a windy so we stay.

questions.questionText: Autumn is cloudy. It _____ cool too.
questions.explanation: It's cool — mô tả thời tiết mùa thu.

questions.questionText: _____ it cold in winter?
questions.explanation: Is it cold — câu hỏi chuẩn.

lessons.title: Lesson 2: Was and Were
lessons.learningObjective: Use was and were to talk about weather and places in the past.

exercises.title: Learn: Was / Were
exercises.instructions: Choose the correct form.

questions.questionText: Yesterday it _____ rainy and windy.
questions.explanation: It → was — quá khứ của is.

questions.questionText: Minh and Linh _____ at home yesterday.
questions.explanation: They → were — quá khứ của are.

questions.questionText: _____ it sunny yesterday?
questions.explanation: Was it sunny — câu hỏi với it.

questions.questionText: We _____ at the beach last summer.
questions.explanation: We → were — trong bài nghe Linh.

exercises.title: Practice: Complete Was / Were
exercises.instructions: Fill in was or were.

questions.questionText: Complete: Yesterday it [0] rainy. | Minh and Linh [1] at home. | It [2] cold in the morning. | We [3] happy inside.
questions.explanation: was; were; was; were — it was, they were.

content.template: Yesterday it [0] rainy. Minh and Linh [1] at home. It [2] cold in the morning. We [3] happy inside.

exercises.title: Check: Was / Were Challenge
exercises.instructions: Choose the correct answer.

questions.questionText: Which sentence is correct?
questions.explanation: It was rainy yesterday — it + was.

choices.distractorNote: Rain là danh từ — cần rainy

questions.questionText: Summer _____ hot last year.
questions.explanation: Summer (it) → was hot.

questions.questionText: Best answer: Were you at home yesterday?
questions.explanation: Yes, we were — trả lời were.

choices.text: Yes, we were. It was rainy.
Yes, we were at home was.

exercises.title: Apply: Order Past Weather Sentences
exercises.instructions: Put the words in order.

questions.questionText: Make: Yesterday / it / was / rainy / and / windy.
questions.explanation: Yesterday it was rainy and windy.

questions.questionText: Make: Minh / and / Linh / were / at / home.
questions.explanation: Minh and Linh were at home.

exercises.title: Review: Was / Were Mix
exercises.instructions: Choose the correct form.

questions.questionText: The weather _____ different yesterday.
questions.explanation: Weather (it) → was different.

questions.questionText: Which sentence is NOT correct?
questions.explanation: We was — sai, phải We were.

choices.text: We was at home all day.

questions.questionText: _____ it cold in winter?
questions.explanation: Was it cold — câu hỏi quá khứ (general).

lessons.title: Lesson 3: Mixed Weather Grammar
lessons.learningObjective: Use It's / was / were together to compare today and yesterday.

exercises.title: Learn: Today vs Yesterday
exercises.instructions: Choose the correct sentence.

questions.questionText: Today it's sunny. Yesterday it _____ rainy.
questions.explanation: Yesterday → was — quá khứ.

questions.questionText: Which pair is correct?
questions.explanation: It's hot today / It was cold yesterday — hiện tại và quá khứ.

choices.text: It hot today. It were cold.
It's hot today. It was cold yesterday.
It's hot today. It is cold yesterday.

questions.questionText: Minh and Linh _____ at home yesterday. Today they are at school.
questions.explanation: They → were — quá khứ.

questions.questionText: In spring the weather _____ warm.
questions.explanation: Weather (it) → is warm — sự thật chung.

exercises.title: Practice: Today and Yesterday Gaps
exercises.instructions: Fill in is, was, were or It's.

questions.questionText: Complete: [0] sunny today. | Yesterday it [1] rainy. | We [2] at home. | Today we [3] at school.
questions.explanation: It's; was; were; are — so sánh hôm nay và hôm qua.

content.template: [0] sunny today. Yesterday it [1] rainy. We [2] at home. Today we [3] at school.

exercises.title: Check: Mixed Grammar Challenge
exercises.instructions: Choose the best answer.

questions.questionText: Mum says: Yes, it _____ rainy and windy. We _____ at home all day.
questions.explanation: was; were — trong bài nghe với mẹ.

questions.questionText: Which sentence is correct?
questions.explanation: It's sunny today but yesterday it was cloudy.

choices.text: It's sunny today but yesterday it is cloudy.
It's sunny today but yesterday it was cloudy.
It sunny today but was cloudy.

questions.questionText: Summer _____ hot. Last summer _____ very hot too.
questions.explanation: is (general); was (last summer — past).

exercises.title: Apply: Build Mixed Sentences
exercises.instructions: Put the words in order.

questions.questionText: Make: It's / hot / today / but / yesterday / it / was / cold.
questions.explanation: It's hot today but yesterday it was cold.

questions.questionText: Make: In / winter / it / can / be / cold.
questions.explanation: In winter it can be cold.

exercises.title: Review: Weather Grammar Mix
exercises.instructions: Choose the correct sentence.

questions.questionText: Best description of Minh's week:
questions.explanation: It's sunny today. Yesterday it was rainy. We were at home.

choices.text: It sunny today. Yesterday were rainy.
It's sunny today. Yesterday it was rainy and we were at home.
It's sunny today. Yesterday it is rainy.

questions.questionText: Linh says: I love summer. It _____ hot and sunny.
questions.explanation: It is hot — mô tả mùa hè nói chung.

questions.questionText: _____ Minh and Linh at the beach last summer?
questions.explanation: Were they — Minh and Linh = they.

lessons.title: Lesson 1: Complete Sentences
lessons.learningObjective: Read a short text and complete sentences about weather today vs yesterday.

exercises.title: Learn: Read About the Weather
exercises.instructions: Read the passage. Answer the questions.

passage.title: Minh and the Weather
passage.text:
Minh is nine. He lives in Hanoi with his mum. Today the weather is sunny and hot. Minh says, "It's sunny today. I can play outside with Linh."

Yesterday the weather was different. It was rainy and windy. Minh and Linh were at home. They couldn't play in the park.

Minh's mum tells him about the four seasons in Vietnam. "In spring the weather is warm. Summer is hot and sometimes rainy. Autumn is cloudy and cool. Winter can be cold, but it doesn't snow in Hanoi."

Linh loves summer best because she likes swimming. Minh likes spring when the flowers bloom. Every day they talk about the weather together.

questions.questionText: What is the weather like today?
questions.explanation: It's sunny and hot today — đoạn đầu bài đọc.

questions.questionText: What was the weather like yesterday?
questions.explanation: It was rainy and windy — hôm qua mưa và gió.

exercises.title: Practice: Complete the Sentence
exercises.instructions: Read again. Choose the best ending for each sentence.

Minh's mum tells him about the four seasons in Vietnam. "In spring the weather is warm. Summer is hot and sometimes rainy. Autumn is cloudy and cool. Winter can be cold, but it doesn't snow in Hanoi."

Linh loves summer best because she likes swimming. Minh likes spring when the flowers bloom. Every day they talk about the weather together.

questions.questionText: Minh says: It's sunny today. I can _____
questions.explanation: Play outside with Linh — trong bài đọc.

questions.questionText: Yesterday Minh and Linh were _____
questions.explanation: At home — không chơi công viên.

exercises.title: Check: Complete Sentences Challenge
exercises.instructions: Read carefully. Complete the idea.

Linh loves summer best because she likes swimming. Minh likes spring when the flowers bloom. Every day they talk about the weather together.

questions.explanation: Sunny and hot — mô tả hôm nay.

questions.explanation: Park — không chơi công viên vì mưa.

questions.questionText: Complete: Yesterday the weather was _____
questions.explanation: Different — hôm qua khác hôm nay.

Linh loves summer best because she likes swimming. Minh likes spring when the flowers bloom. Every day they talk about the weather together.

questions.explanation: sunny; hot; rainy; windy; home — chi tiết từ bài đọc.

questions.questionText: Where does Minh live?
questions.explanation: Hanoi — with his mum.

questions.questionText: Who can Minh play with outside today?
questions.explanation: Linh — his friend.

lessons.title: Lesson 2: Seasons in the Text
lessons.learningObjective: Find information about the four seasons in a short reading text.

exercises.title: Learn: Four Seasons in Vietnam
exercises.instructions: Read the passage. Find season information.

passage.title: Minh and the Weather
passage.text:
Minh is nine. He lives in Hanoi with his mum. Today the weather is sunny and hot. Minh says, "It's sunny today. I can play outside with Linh."

Yesterday the weather was different. It was rainy and windy. Minh and Linh were at home. They couldn't play in the park.

Minh's mum tells him about the four seasons in Vietnam. "In spring the weather is warm. Summer is hot and sometimes rainy. Autumn is cloudy and cool. Winter can be cold, but it doesn't snow in Hanoi."

Linh loves summer best because she likes swimming. Minh likes spring when the flowers bloom. Every day they talk about the weather together.

questions.questionText: Which season is hot and sometimes rainy?
questions.explanation: Summer — mùa hè nóng, đôi khi mưa.

questions.questionText: Which season is cloudy and cool?
questions.explanation: Autumn — mùa thu nhiều mây, mát.

exercises.title: Practice: Season Details
exercises.instructions: Read again. Choose the correct statement.

passage.title: Minh and the Weather
passage.text:
Minh is nine. He lives in Hanoi with his mum. Today the weather is sunny and hot. Minh says, "It's sunny today. I can play outside with Linh."

Yesterday the weather was different. It was rainy and windy. Minh and Linh were at home. They couldn't play in the park.

Minh's mum tells him about the four seasons in Vietnam. "In spring the weather is warm. Summer is hot and sometimes rainy. Autumn is cloudy and cool. Winter can be cold, but it doesn't snow in Hanoi."

Linh loves summer best because she likes swimming. Minh likes spring when the flowers bloom. Every day they talk about the weather together.

questions.questionText: In spring the weather is warm.
questions.explanation: Mum says this — đúng.

questions.questionText: It snows in Hanoi in winter.
questions.explanation: It doesn't snow in Hanoi — sai.

exercises.title: Check: Seasons Detail Search
exercises.instructions: Find the answers in the text.

passage.title: Minh and the Weather
passage.text:
Minh is nine. He lives in Hanoi with his mum. Today the weather is sunny and hot. Minh says, "It's sunny today. I can play outside with Linh."

Yesterday the weather was different. It was rainy and windy. Minh and Linh were at home. They couldn't play in the park.

Minh's mum tells him about the four seasons in Vietnam. "In spring the weather is warm. Summer is hot and sometimes rainy. Autumn is cloudy and cool. Winter can be cold, but it doesn't snow in Hanoi."

Linh loves summer best because she likes swimming. Minh likes spring when the flowers bloom. Every day they talk about the weather together.

questions.questionText: Who loves summer best?
questions.explanation: Linh loves summer — thích bơi.

questions.questionText: Minh likes spring because the flowers _____
questions.explanation: Bloom — hoa nở mùa xuân.

questions.questionText: Winter can be _____ in Vietnam.
questions.explanation: Cold — mùa đông có thể lạnh.

exercises.title: Apply: Complete Season Facts
exercises.instructions: Fill in the gaps using words from the passage.

lessons.title: Lesson 1: Weather at Home
lessons.learningObjective: Listen to a dialogue at home and identify weather words.

exercises.title: Learn: Weather at Home
exercises.instructions: Listen to Minh and his mum. Answer the questions.

script.title: Weather at Home

lines.speaker: Mum
lines.text: Good morning, Minh. Look outside!

lines.speaker: Minh
lines.text: Wow! It's sunny and hot today.

lines.speaker: Mum
lines.text: Yes. Yesterday the weather was different.

lines.speaker: Minh
lines.text: Was it rainy yesterday?

lines.speaker: Mum
lines.text: Yes, it was rainy and windy. We were at home all day.

lines.speaker: Minh
lines.text: Can I play outside with Linh today?

lines.speaker: Mum
lines.text: Yes, but wear a hat. It's very hot.

lines.speaker: Minh
lines.text: OK, Mum. I love sunny days!

script.audioNotes: Warm mother–son dialogue about today vs yesterday weather. Moderate pace. Approx. 45 seconds.

questions.questionText: What's the weather like today?
questions.explanation: It's sunny and hot today — Minh nói.

questions.questionText: Was it sunny yesterday?
questions.explanation: No — it was rainy and windy.

exercises.title: Practice: More Weather Details
exercises.instructions: Listen again. Answer the next questions.

lessons.title: Lesson 2: Linh's Favourite Season
lessons.learningObjective: Listen for season words and favourite weather in a dialogue.

exercises.title: Learn: Favourite Season
exercises.instructions: Listen to Minh and Linh. Answer the questions.

script.title: Linh's Favourite Season

lines.speaker: Minh
lines.text: Hi Linh! What's your favourite season?

lines.speaker: Linh
lines.text: I love summer. It's hot and sunny.

lines.speaker: Minh
lines.text: Summer was great last year. We were at the beach.

lines.speaker: Linh
lines.text: Yes! But autumn is cloudy and cool. I like that too.

lines.speaker: Minh
lines.text: My favourite season is spring. The weather is warm.

lines.speaker: Linh
lines.text: Was it cold in winter?

lines.speaker: Minh
lines.text: Yes, it was cold, but it doesn't snow in Hanoi.

lines.speaker: Linh
lines.text: Let's talk about the weather again tomorrow!

script.audioNotes: Friendly dialogue about four seasons and weather. Approx. 50 seconds.

questions.questionText: What is Linh's favourite season?
questions.explanation: I love summer — Linh nói.

questions.questionText: What is Minh's favourite season?
questions.explanation: My favourite season is spring.

exercises.title: Practice: Season Weather Words
exercises.instructions: Listen again. Focus on weather in each season.

lessons.title: Lesson 1: Write About Today's Weather
lessons.learningObjective: Use frames to write short sentences about today's weather with It's.

exercises.title: Learn: Today's Weather Frames
exercises.instructions: Complete the sentences about today.

questions.questionText: Complete: [0] sunny today. | [1] hot outside. | The [2] is great.
questions.explanation: It's; It's; weather — khung viết hôm nay.

content.template: [0] sunny today. [1] hot outside. The [2] is great.

exercises.title: Practice: Order Weather Sentences
exercises.instructions: Put the words in order.

questions.questionText: Make: It's / sunny / and / hot / today.
questions.explanation: It's sunny and hot today.

exercises.title: Check: Write About Today's Weather
exercises.instructions: Write about the weather today. Use at least 15 words.

content.taskDescription: Write a short message to your friend Linh about today's weather. Use It's + weather word at least once.
prompts: What is the weather like today?

modelAnswer.text: Hi Linh, it's sunny and hot today. The weather is great. I can play outside in the park. It's not windy. See you later!

grammar.criteria: Uses It's / was / were correctly for weather contexts.

vocabulary.criteria: Uses weather and season words from the unit (sunny, rainy, spring, etc.).

organization.criteria: Ideas follow a logical order or answer all prompts clearly.

taskAchievement.criteria: Meets minimum length and addresses the writing task.

questions.questionText: Write your response following the task.
questions.explanation: Chấm theo rubric. Bài mẫu cho thấy độ dài và nội dung mong đợi.

exercises.title: Apply: Choose the Best Sentence
exercises.instructions: Choose the best written sentence for each situation.

questions.questionText: Best message about today's weather:
questions.explanation: It's sunny and hot — đúng cấu trúc It's.

choices.text: Hi Linh, it's sunny and hot today. I can play outside!
It sunny and hot today is.

questions.questionText: Best sentence about the weather:
questions.explanation: The weather is great today — rõ ràng.

choices.text: The weather is great today. It's not windy.

exercises.title: Review: Today Weather Writing Quiz
exercises.instructions: Choose the best way to complete each writing frame.

questions.questionText: Complete: [0] cloudy today? | No, [1] sunny and [2].
questions.explanation: Is it; it's; hot — câu hỏi và trả lời.

lessons.title: Lesson 2: Write About Yesterday
lessons.learningObjective: Write 2–3 connected sentences about past weather with was/were.

exercises.title: Learn: Yesterday's Weather Frames
exercises.instructions: Complete sentences with was or were.

questions.questionText: Complete: Yesterday it [0] rainy. | It [1] windy too. | We [2] at home.
questions.explanation: was; was; were — quá khứ thời tiết.

content.template: Yesterday it [0] rainy. It [1] windy too. We [2] at home.

exercises.title: Practice: Order Past Weather Sentences
exercises.instructions: Put words in order to make past weather sentences.

questions.questionText: Make: Yesterday / it / was / rainy / and / windy.
questions.explanation: Yesterday it was rainy and windy.

exercises.title: Check: Write About Yesterday
exercises.instructions: Write about yesterday's weather. Use at least 15 words.

content.taskDescription: Write a short note about yesterday's weather. Use was or were at least once.
prompts: What was the weather like yesterday?

modelAnswer.text: Yesterday the weather was rainy and windy. Minh and I were at home. We couldn't play in the park. It was cold in the morning too.

grammar.criteria: Uses It's / was / were correctly for weather contexts.

vocabulary.criteria: Uses weather and season words from the unit (sunny, rainy, spring, etc.).

organization.criteria: Ideas follow a logical order or answer all prompts clearly.

taskAchievement.criteria: Meets minimum length and addresses the writing task.

questions.questionText: Write your response following the task.
questions.explanation: Chấm theo rubric. Bài mẫu cho thấy độ dài và nội dung mong đợi.

exercises.title: Apply: Best Yesterday Message
exercises.instructions: Choose the best short message.

questions.questionText: Best note about yesterday:
questions.explanation: Was/were đúng — mưa gió, ở nhà.

choices.text: Yesterday the weather was rainy and windy. Minh and I were at home.
Yesterday it is rainy we was home.

exercises.title: Review: Yesterday Writing Frames
exercises.instructions: Complete the past weather writing frames.

questions.questionText: Complete: Last week it [0] cold. | Minh and Linh [1] at school. | The weather [2] different every day.
questions.explanation: was; were; is — quá khứ và sự thật chung.

content.template: Last week it [0] cold. Minh and Linh [1] at school. The weather [2] different every day.

lessons.title: Lesson 3: Write About Seasons
lessons.learningObjective: Write a short connected message about favourite seasons and weather.

exercises.title: Learn: Season Writing Frames
exercises.instructions: Complete sentences about seasons.

questions.questionText: Complete: My favourite season is [0]. | In summer the weather is [1]. | Winter can be [2].
questions.explanation: spring/summer; hot; cold — mùa và thời tiết.

content.template: My favourite season is [0]. In summer the weather is [1]. Winter can be [2].

exercises.title: Practice: Order Season Sentences
exercises.instructions: Put the sentence parts in logical order.

questions.questionText: Make: I / love / summer / because / it / is / hot / and / sunny.
questions.explanation: I love summer because it is hot and sunny.

exercises.title: Check: Write About Seasons
exercises.instructions: Write about your favourite season. Use at least 15 words.

content.taskDescription: Write a short message about your favourite season and its weather. Name at least one season.
prompts: What is the weather like in that season?

modelAnswer.text: My favourite season is spring. The weather is warm and sunny. I like spring because the flowers bloom. Summer is hot but I like swimming too.

grammar.criteria: Uses It's / was / were correctly for weather contexts.

vocabulary.criteria: Uses weather and season words from the unit (sunny, rainy, spring, etc.).

organization.criteria: Ideas follow a logical order or answer all prompts clearly.

taskAchievement.criteria: Meets minimum length and addresses the writing task.

questions.questionText: Write your response following the task.
questions.explanation: Chấm theo rubric. Bài mẫu cho thấy độ dài và nội dung mong đợi.

exercises.title: Apply: Choose the Best Season Paragraph
exercises.instructions: Choose the best short message about seasons.

questions.questionText: Best message about favourite season:
questions.explanation: Season + weather + reason — đủ thông tin.

choices.text: My favourite season is spring. The weather is warm. I like it because the flowers bloom.
Favourite season spring weather warm bloom.

questions.questionText: Best sentence about winter in Hanoi:
questions.explanation: Winter can be cold but it doesn't snow — đúng bài.

choices.text: Winter can be cold in Hanoi, but it doesn't snow.
It snows every winter in Hanoi.

exercises.title: Review: Season Writing Frames
exercises.instructions: Complete a short season message frame.

questions.questionText: Complete: Linh loves [0] best. | Autumn is [1] and cool. | We talk about the [2] every day.
questions.explanation: summer; cloudy; weather — ôn viết mùa.

content.template: Linh loves [0] best. Autumn is [1] and cool. We talk about the [2] every day.

lessons.title: Lesson 1: Talk About Today's Weather
lessons.learningObjective: Choose appropriate spoken phrases about today's weather.

exercises.title: Learn: What to Say About Today
exercises.instructions: Choose the best thing to say.

questions.questionText: Someone asks: What's the weather like today? You say:
questions.explanation: It's sunny and hot — câu trả lời tự nhiên.

questions.questionText: Best answer: Is it windy today?
questions.explanation: No, it isn't. It's sunny — trả lời đầy đủ.

choices.text: No, it isn't. It's sunny and hot.

exercises.title: Practice: Today Weather Replies
exercises.instructions: Choose the best reply.

questions.questionText: Mum says: Look outside! Best reply:
questions.explanation: Wow! It's sunny and hot — phản ứng tự nhiên.

choices.text: Wow! It's sunny and hot today.

questions.questionText: Can I play outside? Best answer from Mum:
questions.explanation: Yes, but wear a hat — lời mẹ trong bài nghe.

choices.text: Yes, but wear a hat. It's very hot.
Yes you can hat wear hot.

exercises.title: Check: Talk About Today's Weather
exercises.instructions: Answer the questions about today's weather. Speak for up to 90 seconds.

content.prompt: The examiner asks about the weather today.
content.sceneDescription: Story outline: (1) Minh looks out the window — sunny sky, (2) Mum says yesterday was rainy, (3) Minh wants to play outside with Linh, (4) hot sunny day in Hanoi.
followUpQuestions: What do you wear when it's sunny?
suggestedAnswers: I wear a hat and T-shirt.

assessmentCriteria.pronunciation: Weather and season words (sunny, rainy, spring) are clear enough to understand.
assessmentCriteria.fluency: Answers are short but connected; brief pauses are acceptable.
assessmentCriteria.grammar: Uses It's / was / were in short phrases.
assessmentCriteria.vocabulary: Uses weather and season vocabulary from the unit.

questions.questionText: Record your answers to the follow-up questions.
questions.explanation: Chấm tổng thể theo tiêu chí. Trả lời ngắn vẫn được điểm một phần nếu dùng đúng từ vựng.

exercises.title: Apply: Quick Today Weather Replies
exercises.instructions: Choose the best short spoken response.

questions.questionText: Friend asks about today. You say:
questions.explanation: It's sunny — có thể chơi ngoài.

choices.text: It's sunny today. We can play in the park!

exercises.title: Review: Today Weather Speaking Quiz
exercises.instructions: Choose the best spoken answer.

questions.questionText: Describe today's weather. Best phrase:
questions.explanation: It's sunny and hot — mô tả hôm nay.

choices.text: It's sunny and hot. The weather is great!

questions.questionText: Say you love sunny days. Best answer:
questions.explanation: I love sunny days — như Minh nói.

choices.text: I love sunny days! I can play outside.

lessons.title: Lesson 2: Talk About Yesterday
lessons.learningObjective: Use was and were in short spoken answers about past weather.

exercises.title: Learn: Say Was / Were
exercises.instructions: Choose the best spoken answer about yesterday.

questions.questionText: What was the weather like yesterday? You say:
questions.explanation: It was rainy and windy — quá khứ.

choices.text: It was rainy and windy yesterday.

questions.questionText: Where were you yesterday? Best answer:
questions.explanation: We were at home all day — trong bài nghe.

choices.text: We was at home all day.
We were at home all day.
At home we were all day was.

exercises.title: Practice: Past Weather Replies
exercises.instructions: Choose the correct spoken response.

questions.questionText: Was it sunny yesterday? Best reply:
questions.explanation: No, it was rainy and windy.

choices.text: No, it was rainy and windy. We were at home.
No, was it rainy we home.

questions.questionText: Mum explains yesterday. Best thing to repeat:
questions.explanation: Yes, it was rainy and windy — nhắc lại mẹ.

choices.text: Yes, yesterday it was rainy and windy.
Yes it rainy was windy yesterday were.

exercises.title: Check: Talk About Yesterday
exercises.instructions: Answer questions about yesterday's weather. Speak for up to 90 seconds.

content.prompt: The examiner asks about weather in the past.
content.sceneDescription: Timeline: yesterday rainy and windy → Minh and Linh at home → couldn't play in park → Mum says weather was different from today.
followUpQuestions: What was the weather like yesterday?
Were you at home or at school?
suggestedAnswers: Yes, today is sunny and hot.

assessmentCriteria.pronunciation: Weather and season words (sunny, rainy, spring) are clear enough to understand.
assessmentCriteria.fluency: Answers are short but connected; brief pauses are acceptable.
assessmentCriteria.grammar: Uses It's / was / were in short phrases.
assessmentCriteria.vocabulary: Uses weather and season vocabulary from the unit.

questions.questionText: Record your answers to the follow-up questions.
questions.explanation: Chấm tổng thể theo tiêu chí. Trả lời ngắn vẫn được điểm một phần nếu dùng đúng từ vựng.

exercises.title: Apply: Compare Today and Yesterday
exercises.instructions: Pick the most natural spoken comparison.

questions.questionText: Best comparison:
questions.explanation: It's sunny today but yesterday it was rainy.

choices.text: Sunny today rainy yesterday it was is.
It's sunny today, but yesterday it was rainy and windy.
Today sunny yesterday was rainy it.

exercises.title: Review: Yesterday Speaking Quiz
exercises.instructions: Choose the best spoken answer using was/were.

questions.questionText: Could you play outside yesterday? Best answer:
questions.explanation: No — it was rainy. We were at home.

choices.text: No. It was rainy and we were at home.
No it were rainy we was home.

questions.questionText: Ask about yesterday's weather. Best question:
questions.explanation: Was it rainy yesterday? — câu hỏi chuẩn.

lessons.title: Lesson 3: Talk About Seasons
lessons.learningObjective: Describe favourite seasons and weather in short spoken answers.

exercises.title: Learn: Season Phrases
exercises.instructions: Choose the best thing to say about seasons.

questions.questionText: What's your favourite season? Best answer:
questions.explanation: My favourite season is spring — câu hỏi phổ biến.

choices.text: My favourite season is spring. The weather is warm.
My favourite is spring warm weather.

questions.questionText: What is summer like? Best answer:
questions.explanation: Summer is hot and sunny — Linh nói.

choices.text: Summer is hot and sunny. I love swimming!

exercises.title: Practice: Four Seasons Replies
exercises.instructions: Choose the best spoken answers about seasons.

questions.questionText: Does it snow in Hanoi? Best answer:
questions.explanation: No, it doesn't snow in Hanoi — Minh nói.

choices.text: No, it doesn't snow in Hanoi in winter.
No it snows not Hanoi winter.

questions.questionText: What season is cloudy and cool? Best answer:
questions.explanation: Autumn is cloudy and cool — Linh nói.

exercises.title: Check: Talk About Seasons
exercises.instructions: Talk about seasons and favourite weather. Speak for up to 90 seconds.

content.prompt: The examiner asks about seasons and favourite weather.
content.sceneDescription: Four seasons chart: spring warm, summer hot, autumn cloudy cool, winter cold no snow in Hanoi. Linh loves summer; Minh loves spring.
followUpQuestions: What's the weather like in summer?
Does it snow in Hanoi in winter?
What season does Linh like best?
suggestedAnswers: Summer is hot and sometimes rainy.
No, it doesn't snow in Hanoi.

assessmentCriteria.pronunciation: Weather and season words (sunny, rainy, spring) are clear enough to understand.
assessmentCriteria.fluency: Answers are short but connected; brief pauses are acceptable.
assessmentCriteria.grammar: Uses It's / was / were in short phrases.
assessmentCriteria.vocabulary: Uses weather and season vocabulary from the unit.

questions.questionText: Record your answers to the follow-up questions.
questions.explanation: Chấm tổng thể theo tiêu chí. Trả lời ngắn vẫn được điểm một phần nếu dùng đúng từ vựng.

exercises.title: Apply: Tell About Favourite Season
exercises.instructions: Choose the best short spoken description.

questions.questionText: Best short story about Linh and seasons:
questions.explanation: Linh loves summer → hot → swimming — thứ tự rõ.

choices.text: Linh summer hot swimming loves beach.
Linh loves summer best because it's hot and sunny. She likes swimming at the beach.
Summer Linh loves hot beach swimming sunny.

exercises.title: Review: Seasons Speaking Quiz
exercises.instructions: Choose the best spoken answer.

questions.questionText: Talk about all four seasons. Best opening:
questions.explanation: There are four seasons — spring, summer, autumn, winter.

choices.text: Four seasons spring summer autumn winter there are.
There are four seasons: spring, summer, autumn and winter.

questions.questionText: What do Minh and Linh talk about every day?
questions.explanation: The weather — cuối bài đọc.

choices.text: They talk weather every about day.
They talk about the weather every day.
